name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖【New Arrival】GG Emblem Extra Mini Bag
name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖【New Arrival】GG Emblem Extra Mini Bag
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This extra mini bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from selected classic GG grained leather. The design is carefully paired with a chain shoulder strap, and a detachable leather shoulder strap is included.
Black GG Grained Leather
Cotton-Linen Blend Lining
Leather Strap (97-101cm long); Chain Strap (48cm long)
Detachable Chain Strap (50cm high)
Zipper Closure
Extra Mini Dimensions: 20-23cm (W) x 12cm (H) x 2cm (D)
Weight: Approx. 240g
Made in Italy
Model: 815278
Size: 23(L) x 12(W) x 2(T)
Color: Black Full Grain/Original Leather
Made in Italy
